text.tspan: 1 · Consulta de trilha de auditoria — RF022 · RF024 · RN23 · RN24
2 · Geração automática de log (via correção retroativa)
Log é imutável — nenhum DELETE ou UPDATE permitido na tabela logs
3 · Sem logs para o filtro informado

svg.text: SELECT logs JOIN shifts WHERE filters
ORDER BY timestamp DESC LIMIT 50 OFFSET n
200 { logs: [ { id, type, old_value, new_value, author, timestamp, justification } ], total, page }
correctCheckpoint + insertLog(shift_id, type, old_value, new_value, author_id, role)
UPDATE checkpoints SET distance, old_distance, reviewed=true ...
INSERT INTO logs (shift_id, type, checkpoint_id, old_value, new_value, ...)
200 { id, shift_id, distance, old_distance, reviewed, reviewed_at }
